name: Rohit Pawar
quote: The #NEET paper leak has shattered the dreams of lakhs of students across the country. Against this corrupt system, and for the education minister's resignation, today is the 19th day of the hunger strike by Sonam Wangchuk, one of this country's great education experts. For the secure future of the coming generation, everyone must now wake up, stand with this fight, and force this arrogant government to bow before public sentiment.
